exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement

sub_exhibits.name: Exhibit 1: Location of Real Estate Office
Exhibit 2: Names and Addresses of Principal Equity Owners

exhibits.notes: 41+ page franchise agreement. Key provisions summarized in Item 17 table.

exhibits.name: Area Development and Royalty Share Agreement

sub_exhibits.name: Exhibit 1: Development Area and Development Schedule

exhibits.notes: Available after opening 5 franchised outlets. Non-exclusive development area.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Two sets: FY2024/2023 (pp 105-121) and FY2023/2022 (pp 122-137). Auditor: Schild & Co., Inc. Clean opinions both sets.

exhibits.name: List of Franchise Outlets
exhibits.notes: 44 franchised outlets + 8 company-owned offices as of 12/31/2024. Includes names, addresses, phone numbers by state.

exhibits.name: List of Terminated Franchises
exhibits.notes: 5 entries in 2024: 4 transferred equity ownership (Jay Lesko in DE, MD, PA) + 1 canceled by mutual consent (Joel Mack in Oakton, VA). No failed communication.

exhibits.name: State Franchise Administrators and Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Lists agents for CA, HI, IL, IN, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI.

exhibits.name: State Specific Addenda
exhibits.notes: 7 state addenda. CA, MD, VA, WA require fee deferral. WI addendum contains template error (references 'Realty ONE Group Affiliates, Inc.').

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates
exhibits.notes: Only Wisconsin effective (3/24/2025). CA, MD, MI, NY, VA, WA all 'Pending'.

exhibits.name: Receipts
exhibits.notes: Standard FTC-compliant receipt. Franchise sellers: Adam S. Gamble, Robert Cleapor, Corey Kaplan.
